data.title: Inchcape Announces Total Voting Rights and Share Capital Update
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

Inchcape ( (GB:INCH) ) has shared an update.

Inchcape plc has announced its total voting rights and capital as of 31 July 2025, with an issued share capital of 372,063,025 ordinary shares, each carrying one vote. This information is crucial for shareholders to determine their notification requirements under the Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules, impacting how they manage their interests in the company.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:INCH) stock is a Buy with a £11.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Inchcape stock, see the GB:INCH Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:INCH is a Outperform.

Inchcape’s overall stock score is driven by its strong financial health and attractive valuation, which are slightly offset by bearish technical indicators. The significant share buyback program further bolsters confidence in the stock’s potential, despite current market pressures.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:INCH stock, click here.

More about Inchcape

Inchcape plc operates in the automotive distribution and retail industry, focusing on the sale and distribution of vehicles and related services. The company is known for its global presence and partnerships with major automotive brands, providing a range of services from vehicle sales to aftersales support.

data.title: Biodexa Pharmaceuticals Implements ADR Ratio Change
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Biodexa Pharmaceuticals ( (BDRX) ) just unveiled an update.

On July 31, 2025, Biodexa Pharmaceuticals PLC announced the effective change in the ratio of its American Depositary Receipts (ADR) from one ADR representing ten thousand ordinary shares to one ADR representing one hundred thousand ordinary shares. This change, which acts as a one-for-ten reverse ADR split, was automatically implemented, with JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. handling the exchange. The total number of issued ordinary shares remains unchanged, but the number of ADRs outstanding is now 619,523. This adjustment is expected to impact the company’s market positioning by potentially enhancing the attractiveness of its ADRs to investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (BDRX) stock is a Buy with a $18.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Biodexa Pharmaceuticals stock, see the BDRX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BDRX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BDRX is a Neutral.

Biodexa Pharmaceuticals has a low overall stock score of 45, driven by significant financial challenges, bearish technical indicators, and a poor valuation. The lack of positive earnings guidance further adds to the uncertainty. The company must improve financial performance and operational efficiency to enhance investor confidence.

To see Spark’s full report on BDRX stock, click here.

More about Biodexa Pharmaceuticals

Biodexa Pharmaceuticals PLC is a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing innovative products for the treatment of diseases with unmet medical needs.

Average Trading Volume: 2,601,077

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $575.1K

data.title: Robin Energy Ltd. Allocates $5 Million to Bitcoin as Treasury Asset
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Robin Energy Ltd. ( (RBNE) ) has issued an update.

On July 31, 2025, Robin Energy Ltd. announced its decision to adopt Bitcoin as a primary treasury reserve asset, with an initial allocation of $5 million. This strategic move aims to optimize the company’s balance sheet for long-term value creation, leveraging Bitcoin’s potential as an inflation hedge and diversification tool. The initiative will be funded through existing cash reserves, ensuring no impact on operational liquidity or growth initiatives, and will be executed with high security and compliance standards.

More about Robin Energy Ltd.

Robin Energy Ltd. is an international ship-owning company that provides energy transportation services globally. The company owns a Handysize tanker vessel and an LPG carrier, which transport petrochemical gases and refined petroleum products worldwide.

data.title: Metech International Faces Challenges and Explores New Ventures
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Metech International Limited ( (SG:V3M) ) has shared an update.

Metech International Limited is in the process of appointing a new Chief Financial Officer, with due diligence currently underway. The company is facing challenges in its lab-grown diamond business due to geopolitical tensions and is reconsidering its viability. Meanwhile, Metech has entered a non-binding memorandum with MLF Ingredients to develop a food waste compression system, showing promising results in protein content analysis.

More about Metech International Limited

Metech International Limited, incorporated in Singapore, operates in the lab-grown diamond and food waste management industries. The company focuses on developing innovative solutions such as a food waste compression system to produce premium protein powder and black soldier fly biomass.

data.title: PanAsialum Holdings Issues Profit Warning Amid Financial Downturn
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

PanAsialum Holdings Co. Ltd. ( (HK:2078) ) has shared an update.

PanAsialum Holdings Co. Ltd. has issued a profit warning, indicating a significant financial downturn. The company expects to report a loss of approximately HK$26.6 million for the first half of 2025, a stark contrast to the HK$5.9 million profit recorded in the same period of 2024. This negative shift is attributed to a substantial decline in revenue, from HK$433.9 million to HK$242.8 million, driven by geopolitical tensions, changing trade policies, and a sluggish economic recovery in key markets. Additionally, the gross profit margin fell from 17.2% to 11.8%, exacerbated by lower order volumes and increased production costs. Stakeholders are advised to exercise caution as the final financial results may differ from preliminary estimates.

More about PanAsialum Holdings Co. Ltd.

Average Trading Volume: 59,571

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$151.1M

data.title: Empro Group Inc. Completes Over-Allotment Option in IPO
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Empro Group Inc. ( (EMPG) ) has provided an announcement.

On July 29, 2025, Empro Group Inc. announced the partial exercise of the over-allotment option by R.F. Lafferty & Co., Inc., related to its initial public offering. The closing of the sale of 115,000 additional shares took place on July 30, 2025, resulting in gross proceeds of $5,960,000. This development marks a significant milestone for Empro Group Inc., as its shares began trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the ticker symbol ‘EMPG’ on July 2, 2025. The successful IPO and subsequent over-allotment exercise enhance the company’s financial position and market visibility, potentially benefiting stakeholders by increasing the company’s capital for further expansion.

More about Empro Group Inc.

Empro Group Inc. is a rising beauty and personal care brand headquartered in Malaysia. The company has evolved from its origins in Malaysia’s eyebrow embroidery space to become a trusted name across cosmetics, skincare, and healthcare. Empro Group Inc. is expanding its presence across Southeast Asia and Europe, focusing on providing accessible, quality self-care solutions.

data.title: Graphjet Technology Expands with New Machinery Arrival
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Graphjet Technology ( (GTI) ) has provided an update.

On July 30, 2025, Graphjet Technology announced the arrival of new machinery and equipment at its factory in Malaysia, marking a significant step in its expansion plans. The installation, overseen by a specialist, is expected to be completed within a week, followed by a comprehensive test run. This development is anticipated to enhance Graphjet’s production capabilities by approximately seven times, positioning the company to capitalize on the growing global demand for graphite and graphene, particularly in the advanced semiconductor manufacturing sector.

More about Graphjet Technology

Graphjet Technology Sdn. Bhd., founded in 2019 in Malaysia, is an innovative producer of graphene and graphite. The company utilizes a patented technology to recycle palm kernel shells, a waste product from palm seed oil production, to create single-layer graphene and artificial graphite, aiming to revolutionize the global supply chain for these materials.

data.description:

Silver Touch Technologies Ltd. ( (IN:SILVERTUC) ) has provided an announcement.

Silver Touch Technologies Ltd. announced its financial results for the quarter ending June 30, 2025, and several key decisions from its recent board meeting. The company reported unaudited financial results, recommended a final dividend of ₹0.50 per share, and appointed M/s. Sandip Sheth & Associates as secretarial auditors for five years. Additionally, the board recommended the re-appointment of two directors and scheduled the 31st Annual General Meeting for August 26, 2025. These decisions reflect the company’s ongoing efforts to maintain transparency and shareholder engagement.
